response.justification: Exceptionally strong candidate with 15+ years of full-stack experience and current Staff-level role explicitly involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—a critical required skill. While Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack components, the extensive TypeScript/Node.js backend expertise, proven testing/TDD commitment, and ability to build end-to-end systems at scale demonstrate the technical foundation to quickly master those specific frameworks.
strengths: Current Staff role with explicit AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience, directly matching the required 'AI agent development' skill
15+ years of full-stack development with demonstrated TypeScript/Node.js expertise, strong testing/TDD culture, and proven ability to learn multiple frameworks rapidly
Designed and built end-to-end systems at scale (GISCollective on Kubernetes, direct mail optimization at Optilyz serving millions, microservices handling millions of requests/second)
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in skills or experience despite being primary stack components; unclear if hands-on experience exists with these specific frameworks
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience covers MongoDB and MySQL but not the specific relational database listed in job requirements
Career pattern shows multiple 1–2 year tenures across several roles; potential question about long-term stability and commitment to a single position
